content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Sniper
description: Legendary Jakobs class mod for Zer0 the Assassin, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Precisi0n, 0ne Sh0t 0ne Kill, Headsh0t, Kill C0nfirmed, Vel0city. Focused on sniper rifle damage and critical hits.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC.

special.description: At max level: +61% sniper rifle damage.
special.title: Boom! Headshot.
